pain_themes.description: Users struggle with managing a high volume of support tickets, leading to missed priorities and delays in responses.
supporting_quotes: the number of tickets we get the issue then to prioritize them
too many sales, too many issues, too many escalation as the response were slow

pain_themes.description: Relying on manual assessments to prioritize tickets often leads to misallocation of focus, impacting urgent and high revenue-related issues.
supporting_quotes: I try and look into top 10 tickets in my bucket and try and do manual assessment on priority
I missed a high revenue impact ticket, while trying to solve a high number of customer impact ticket

pain_themes.description: Users find it hard to extract and assess the impact of ticket failures, leading to substantial errors in ticket handling.
supporting_quotes: missed a high revenue impact ticket

pain_themes.description: The process of summarizing and organizing ticket information is excessively time-consuming due to ticket volume.
Users face challenges with escalation processes during peak periods, causing delays and increased pressure.
supporting_quotes: too many escalations as the response were slow
